title: The Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation (Repeal) Act, 1981
title_en: The Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation (Repeal) Act, 1981
description: An Act to repeal the Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation Order, 1972. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation Order, 1972 (P.O.

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Act may be called the Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation (Repeal) Act, 1981 .
(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 25th day of March, 1981.

provisions.title: 2. Repeal of P.O. No. 47 of 1972
provisions.content: 2. The Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation Order, 1972 (P.O. No. 47 of 1972), hereinafter referred to as the said Order, is hereby repealed.

provisions.title: 3. Savings
4. Repeal and savings
provisions.content:
4. (1) The Bangladesh Consumer Supplies Corporation (Repeal) Ordinance, 1981 (Ord. IV of 1981), is hereby repealed.
(2) Notwithstanding such repeal, anything done or any action taken or any order made under the said Ordinance shall be deemed to have been done, taken or made, as the case may be, under the corresponding provision of this Act.
